free_text: specialists' meeting on neutron cross sections
of fission product nuclei, held at bologna,
on loan from oak ridge national laboratory.
Flight path    60 m for capture measurements,
scintillators, 4 inch diameter, 3 inch long, in
optical contact with emi Pm (2823qkb) for the capture
measurements they were weighted over 256 amplitude
channels (maier-leibnitz method) using a MONTE CARLO
elastic scattering measurements. They are mounted
at 140 degrees with respect to the incoming beam.
Using a modified tacasi area analysis program
.Multiple interaction effects are corrected for in the
multiple scattering for the capture measurements.

.The level spacing was determined using a method
by rohr et Al.,(Proceedings of the same conference),
which separates large S-wave resonances from smaller
ones and from resonances with higher angular
momentum by means of the bayes' theorem. The number
of resonances lost is estimated assuming a porter-
thomas distribution of the reduced neutron widths.
